title: HeadyEx — AI API Credit Exchange & Data Marketplace
description: HeadyEx is the exchange layer of the Heady AI economy — trade API credits, embedding compute, vector storage, GPU burst capacity, and curated datasets across multiple providers with real-time metering and unified settlement. Coming Q4 2026.
ogTitle: HeadyEx — Trade the Building Blocks of AI
ogDescription: The exchange layer of the Heady AI economy. Buy, sell, and trade API credits, compute capacity, data streams, and agent labor with real-time metering and multi-provider settlement. Coming Q4 2026.
twitterDescription: 6 markets. Real-time metering. Multi-provider settlement. Trade AI API credits, compute, vector storage, and data. The exchange layer of the Heady ecosystem. Q4 2026.

structuredData.name: HeadyEx
structuredData.description: AI API credit and compute resource exchange platform with real-time metering and multi-provider settlement.
